raw_note: Seen w wheeze/SOB c/w mild asthma exacerbation, sats stable in clinic. Prednisolone 40mg od for 5 days. Continue salbutamol inhaler 2 puffs q4h prn and usual preventer regularly. Rest, fluids, avoid smoke/exertion until improved. Book asthma review with practice nurse in 1 wk. If needing blue inhaler more often than 4-hourly, unable to speak in full sentences, worsening breathlessness, drowsiness or lips blue -> call 999 / attend A&E.
